name: claude-science-workflows

summary.codex_science_strategy: Port procedural workflow knowledge, document runtime-dependent features, and keep credentials or private user state out of the repository.

workflow_patterns.codex_action: Keep orchestrator instructions short and route to reference files only when needed.
Extract PDF text/page maps once, cache intermediate files, and synthesize from page-tagged evidence.
Search and verify current primary sources before writing reviews or clinical claims.
Inspect saved figures for data consistency, label geometry, color semantics, and perceptual legibility.
Record base images, package phases, cache paths, smoke tests, GPU witnesses, and provider gotchas.
Use progress JSON plus phase waypoint files for dossiers, long evidence reviews, and multi-step analyses.

runtime_dependencies: Claude Science host SDK calls such as host.query, host.compute, host.delegate, host.llm, host.view_image, host.model_endpoints
Claude Science compute_provider and repl kernels
Claude Science artifact and metadata database
User-configured credentials, host grants, remote providers, and managed endpoints
